description: Add address constants for SN-D tone block: Common (3 params), per-note instrument data (62 notes, offset 00 10 00 through 00 4D 00, each note block at 0x02 intervals). Per-note params: inst number, level, pan, coarse/fine tune, ambience send, decay, brilliance, variation, dynamic range, stereo width, output assign (14 params). Add SnDrumKitState and SnDrumNoteState structs.
title: Core: SN-D address map and state types
